<?php /** * This file is part of the Carbon package. * * (c) Brian Nesbitt <brian@nesbot.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ return array_replace_recursive(require __DIR__.'/en.php', [ 'meridiem' => ['Lwamilawu', 'Pashamihe'], 'weekdays' => ['Mulungu', 'Jumatatu', 'Jumanne', 'Jumatano', 'Alahamisi', 'Ijumaa', 'Jumamosi'], 'weekdays_short' => ['Mul', 'Jtt', 'Jnn', 'Jtn', 'Alh', 'Iju', 'Jmo'], 'weekdays_min' => ['Mul', 'Jtt', 'Jnn', 'Jtn', 'Alh', 'Iju', 'Jmo'], 'months' => ['Mupalangulwa', 'Mwitope', 'Mushende', 'Munyi', 'Mushende Magali', 'Mujimbi', 'Mushipepo', 'Mupuguto', 'Munyense', 'Mokhu', 'Musongandembwe', 'Muhaano'], 'months_short' => ['Mup', 'Mwi', 'Msh', 'Mun', 'Mag', 'Muj', 'Msp', 'Mpg', 'Mye', 'Mok', 'Mus', 'Muh'], 'first_day_of_week' => 1, 'formats' => [ 'LT' => 'HH:mm', 'LTS' => 'HH:mm:ss', 'L' => 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'LL' => 'D MMM YYYY', 'LLL' => 'D MMMM YYYY HH:mm', 'LLLL' => 'dddd, D MMMM YYYY HH:mm', ], ]);
